channel.title: Blogs on Alexey Plekhanov
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Alexey Plekhanov

item.title: Interesting PHP question
item.description: Recently, I’ve come up with an interesting question that can potentially be used for interviewing candidates 🙂 Imagine we have such a PHP class. class Collection implements Countable { private $items = []; public function __construct(array $data) { $this->items = $data; } public function count(): int { return count($this->items); } } $collection = new Collection(['one', 'two', 'three']); Which is going to be faster: count($collection) or $collection->count()?
